results.name: Uploads sem validação de tipo
results.evidence: src/esaa/validator.py ignores file content, validating only path against contract allowlist.

results.name: Uploads sem limite de tamanho
results.evidence: No file size enforcement in backend or ESAA core; subprocess output captured in memory without limits.

results.name: Uploads armazenados no servidor da aplicação
results.evidence: By design for local orchestration PoC; storage restricted by ESAA boundaries.

results.name: Ausência de antivírus
results.evidence: No malware scanning integrated into the agent result processing pipeline.

results.name: Possibilidade de upload executável
results.evidence: Agents with 'impl' task_kind can write executable files (.py, .sh, .js) to src/ directory.

results.name: Filenames não sanitizados
results.evidence: _validate_safe_path in src/esaa/validator.py effectively prevents path traversal.

recommendations: Implement magic bytes validation in validator.py using python-magic or file-type.
Add max_file_size constraints to AGENT_CONTRACT.yaml and enforce them during submission.
Restrict backend process filesystem permissions to the active workspace only.
Implement API authentication to protect endpoints that trigger file-mutating agent runs.
